sentences.translation: Odmor je bio kratak, ali zabavan.
sentences.translationEn: The break was short but enjoyable.

sentences.arabic: أَكَلَ الطُّلَّابُ وَجْبَاتِهِمُ الخَفِيفَةَ فِي الفِنَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Učenici su jeli užinu u dvorištu.
sentences.translationEn: The students ate their snacks in the yard.

sentences.arabic: لَعِبَ بَعْضُهُمُ الكُرَةَ وَجَلَسَ بَعْضُهُمْ يَتَحَدَّثُونَ.
sentences.translation: Neki su igrali loptu a neki sjeli i razgovarali.
sentences.translationEn: Some played ball and some sat talking.

sentences.arabic: رَنَّ الجَرَسُ وَعَادَ الجَمِيعُ إِلَى فُصُولِهِمْ.
sentences.translation: Zazvonilo je zvono i svi su se vratili u razrede.
sentences.translationEn: The bell rang and everyone returned to their classrooms.

sentences.translation: Bili su spremni za sljedeći čas.
sentences.translationEn: They were ready for the next lesson.
